kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: La Page "Login" Est Visible
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
La page de login doit petre visible

test.name: La Page Virements Est Accessible

kw.name: Obtenir Les Identifiants Standards
Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.
Obtenir les identifiants standards

kw.name: Login Avec Identifiants
La Page "Login" Est Visible
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
La page de login doit petre visible

kw.name: Saisir Email
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Saisir l'email

kw.name: Saisir Mot De Passe
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Saisir le mot de passe
Saisit les identifiants et soumet le formulaire de login

kw.name: La Page "Commune" Est Visible
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
La page de login doit petre visible

kw.name: Se Rendre Sur La Page Des Virements
Ouvrir L'Onglet Virements
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroller En Haut De La Page
Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key HOME to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Scroller en haut de la page

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Ouvre l'onglet Virements depuis le menu principal
Ouvre l'onglet Virements

kw.name: La Page Virements Est Visible
Obtenir La Présence De La Page Virements
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Vérifie que le titre de la page virements est visible
Vérifie que la page virements est bien affichée

kw.name: Logout
Cliquer sur "Déconnexion"
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Cliquer sur le bouton "déconnexion"

kw.name: La Page "Login" Est Visible
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
La page de login doit petre visible
Déconnexion et retour à la page login

test.doc: Vérifie que la page Virements est accessible depuis le menu principal

test.name: Effectuer Un Virement Interne Valide

kw.name: Selectionner Compte Source
Selectionner Compte Source Dans La Liste
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@data-testid="select-from-account"]' by value 4.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.
Séléectionne le compte source dans la liste des comptes
Sélectionner le compte source du virement

kw.name: Selectionner Compte Destination
Selectionner Compte Destinataire Dans La Liste
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@data-testid="select-to-account"]' by value 5.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.
Sélectionne le compte de destination dans la liste des comptes
Sélectionner le compte du destinataire du virement

kw.name: Saisir Montant Dans Le Champ
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Saisie du montant dans le champ prévu

kw.name: Valider Le Virement
Valider Le Virement
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Cliquer sur Valider le payement
Valider Le virement

kw.name: Le Message De Confirmation Est Visible
Obtenir La Présence Du Message De Confirmation
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.doc: Vérifie qu’un montant nul déclenche une erreur

kw.name: Fermer L'Application
Fermer Les Navigateurs
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Ferme tous ls navigateurs
Ferme proprement le navigateur.
